title: X(g) / Y(g) segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geoms (id INT PRIMARY KEY, g POINT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE nodes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, g POINT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO geoms (id, g) VALUES (1, POINT(1, 1)), (2, POINT(2, 2));
INSERT INTO nodes (id, g) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, POINT(3, 3));
SELECT ST_X(g) FROM geoms UNION SELECT ST_Y(g) FROM nodes WHERE g IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: selecting X(g) or Y(g) from geometry tables
